# cloudinaryprovisioning_access_key (Resource)

Manages an API access key for a Cloudinary product environment. Access keys provide the credentials needed to interact with a product environment's API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudinaryprovisioning_product_environment" "example" {
  name    = "my-project"
  enabled = true
}

resource "cloudinaryprovisioning_access_key" "example" {
  product_environment_id = cloudinaryprovisioning_product_environment.example.id
  name                   = "my-system-api-key"
  enabled                = true
}

output "api_key" {
  value = cloudinaryprovisioning_access_key.example.api_key
}

output "api_secret" {
  value     = cloudinaryprovisioning_access_key.example.api_secret
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `product_environment_id` (String) The ID of the product environment this access key belongs to. Changing this value forces a new resource to be created.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the access key is enabled.
- `name` (String) A display name for the access key.

### Read-Only

- `api_key` (String) The API key identifier.
- `api_secret` (String, Sensitive) The API secret. Only available immediately after creation. Preserved in state.
- `created_at` (String) The time at which the access key was created (RFC3339).
- `updated_at` (String) The time at which the access key was last updated (RFC3339).
